tagline: Pool Service Made Simple in St. George, Utah

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Perfected Every
Single Visit
hero.subheadline: St. George summers are too short to waste on pool maintenance. TruBlu's CPO-certified techs handle everything — cleaning, chemicals, repairs — so you just dive in and enjoy.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for St. George Homes
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to emergency green pool rescues, TruBlu handles every aspect of pool ownership so you can spend your time poolside, not working on it.

cards.title: Recurring Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly service including skimming, vacuuming, brushing, chemical balancing, basket emptying, and full equipment inspection. Your pool stays swim-ready between every visit.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems — our CPO-certified techs diagnose and fix issues fast. We proactively address wear before it becomes a costly breakdown.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: St. George heat breeds algae fast. Our specialized treatment combines deep cleaning with precise chemical monitoring to restore crystal-clear water in days, not weeks.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Detailed health reports on every piece of equipment in your pool system. We identify potential issues early and recommend preventative solutions to save you money.

cards.title: Chemical & Parts Delivery
cards.description: Manufacturer-direct pool parts, chemicals, and accessories delivered to your door. Replacement parts, upgrades, and everything your pool needs to run at peak performance.

cards.title: Seasonal Pool Prep
cards.description: Get your pool dialed in for St. George's long swim season. Opening, closing, and mid-season tune-ups that keep water balanced and equipment running efficiently year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free First Cleaning
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and schedule your complimentary first service. No contracts, no commitments — just a chance to see the TruBlu difference firsthand.

steps.title: We Show Up & Keep You Informed
steps.description: You'll get a real-time notification when your CPO-certified tech is on the way. After every visit, we send a detailed service report so you always know exactly what was done.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season long. If anything isn't perfect, we come back and make it right — guaranteed. That's the TruBlu promise.

about.label: Why St. George Trusts TruBlu
about.headline: Two Best Friends on a Mission to Fix Pool Service
about.description: TruBlu was founded right here in St. George by two best friends who saw how pool service should be done — and how most companies fall short. Every technician is CPO-certified. Every visit includes a detailed report. You get real-time notifications when we're on the way. We built TruBlu because pool owners deserve transparency, professionalism, and techs who genuinely care about doing the job right.

features.title: Real-Time Arrival Notifications
features.description: No more wondering when your tech will show up. You get an alert the moment we're headed to your property — every single visit.

features.title: Detailed Service Reports
features.description: After every visit, you receive a full report covering what we did, what we found, and any recommendations. Complete transparency, always.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a service visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. No questions asked, no fine print. That's TruBlu's promise to you.

pricing.headline: Simple Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no cancellation fees.

guarantee.headline: The TruBlu Satisfaction Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. We also send detailed reports after every visit so you can see exactly what was done. No fine print, no runaround. Just honest pool service from a team that stands behind their work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in St. George are scheduled within 3-5 business days. Your first cleaning is free, so there's zero risk to try us out. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority scheduling.

faqs.question: What makes TruBlu different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Three things: every technician is CPO-certified, you get real-time arrival notifications so you always know when we're coming, and we send a detailed service report after every single visit. Most pool companies just show up and leave — we keep you informed every step of the way.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our St. George clients give us gate access and go about their day. You'll get a notification when we arrive and a full service report when we're done, so you always know exactly what happened.

faqs.question: Are there any contracts or cancellation fees?
faqs.answer: Never. We earn your business every visit. No long-term contracts, no cancellation penalties, no hidden fees. If you ever want to stop service, just let us know — no hard feelings.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve St. George, Santa Clara, Ivins, Washington, Hurricane, and surrounding communities throughout Washington County, Utah. If you're not sure whether we cover your area, give us a call and we'll let you know.

testimonials.name: Judd M.
testimonials.text: TruBlu exceeds expectations on every service provided. They truly care about your pool, and their customers! I highly recommend TruBlu!

testimonials.name: Tyler G.
testimonials.text: Blake is by far the best pool service guy I've worked with. I've had him for months now and he's always thorough and easy to work with.

testimonials.name: Rachel J.
testimonials.text: I adore these guys. They do an awesome job, communicate quickly and clearly about any issues or concerns, and are pleasant to work with. I can't recommend them highly enough!

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Takes Care of Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get your free first cleaning — no contracts, no pressure. Just honest pool service from a team that actually cares about doing it right.
